essence: Maintains security and order within custodial facilities while supporting rehabilitation and welfare of detainees.

identity.title: Prison Officer
identity.summary: Supervises prisoners, enforces rules, delivers programmes, and ensures safety and security within custodial settings.

salary.notes: Roles with specialist responsibilities or seniority attract higher pay.

qualifications: Training in custodial operations and conflict management
Ability to work shifts and manage challenging behaviour

lifestyle.description: Shift work in secure environments with high responsibility for safety, welfare, and rehabilitation activities.

habits: Works with multi‑disciplinary teams for welfare
